# Installation Closeout and Pre-Delivery Final Inspection: Final Walkthrough, Defect Rectification, and Project Handover Documentation

## 适用受众
Site_Supervisor

## 写作角度说明
安装收尾与交付前检查是现场主管完成安装工程、正式移交项目前的最后工作。通过系统性的收尾检查和缺陷整改，确保工程以良好状态交付，为调试团队提供干净的施工起点。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
Delaying the final installation clean — after commissioning has started — means that construction dust introduced during commissioning activities contaminates HVAC filters and invalidates the HEPA filter replacement interval established during commissioning.

## 参考素材
- Final clean protocol: construction clean (construction debris, dust, protective film removal) → specification clean (surface cleaning per stainless steel passivation procedure) → sterile clean (for GMP areas, alcohol wipe-down of all surfaces)
- Final inspection: full walkthrough with commissioning engineer and client representative, all punch list items verified closed, all equipment ID labels affixed
- Protective equipment removal: remove all temporary protection (corner guards, adhesive felt, protective film) during closeout, document removal in closeout report
- Spare parts handover: verify all manufacturer-supplied spare parts present, signed handover form with quantity confirmation
- Closeout documentation package: as-built drawings, pre-cover inspection records, punch list register (all items closed), equipment serial number register, commissioning holdover list (if any)

## 关键词
Installation Closeout, Final Inspection, Punch List Closeout, Project Handover, Spare Parts Handover, Closeout Documentation
